name: fable5-codex
description: Fable-5 evidence-first review, audit, fact-check, understanding, design, and sweep workflows for Codex with ECF-style run contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-first governed workflows for serious codebase work.
interface.longDescription: Fable-5 for Codex provides reusable skills for audits, deep reviews, fact checks, codebase understanding, design options, and repo-wide sweeps. Each workflow emphasizes ECF-style run contracts, source-grounded mapping, independent lenses, verified findings, rejected-candidate preservation, coverage notes, explicit unknowns, and honest Workflow Traces for real subagent use.
defaultPrompt: Use $fable-audit with real Codex subagents and an ECF run contract on this repo. I explicitly authorize parallel subagents for this run.
Use $fable-understand with an ECF run contract to explain boot flow.
